examples: It was wrong of me to disobey father and to run away from home.
In case you do disobey, you will be the one to suffer, not anyone else.
Those who disobey will be severely punished.
He had argued that he had been put under pressure by the girl and was unable to disobey her.
Over the weekend, Sheriff Denny Peyman of Jackson County, Kentucky, said that he too would disobey any directive from the administration.
